hooks.prompt: Review the Marp slide artifacts after every edit. Read .slide-work/request.yaml, .slide-work/outline.yaml, .slide-work/review.json, and slides/presentation.md. Evaluate against the review rubric: missing required info, audience fit, goal alignment, one-slide-one-message, logical flow, overflow risk, terminology difficulty, and export readiness. Write the updated review result to .slide-work/review.json. Return {"ok": true} only when no blocking issue remains. $ARGUMENTS

Check if Claude is allowed to stop. Read .slide-work/review.json. Allow Claude to stop ONLY if ALL of the following conditions are met: (1) .slide-work/review.json exists, (2) status is "pass", (3) missing_required is an empty array, (4) questions_for_user is an empty array. If any condition is not met, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Review has not passed. Current status: <status>. Remaining issues: <summary>."}. If all conditions are met, return {"ok": true}. $ARGUMENTS
